chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Revision Application No.212 of 2025 [Muhammad Aslam v. The State] ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judges ______________________________________________________________ For hg of main case 05.03.2026. Mr. Akber Zameen Khattak, advocate for applicant. Mr. Ali Haider Salim, Additional Prosecutor General. Learned counsel for applicant does not press this application and submits that he will challenge the property order in revision application passed finally by the learned trial Court vide judgment dated 07.12.2023 whereby accused were acquitted. The Cr. Revision Application is accordingly disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
